chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S-147 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on O/objection at flag-A. 2. For hearing of pre arrest bail. 14.07.2025 Mr. Qaimuddin Malano, Advocate for complainant. Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, Deputy Prosecutor General...-..-...-..-..-..-..-..- Applicants appear in person and states that matter has been settled and compromise has been effected before learned trial Court, vide order dated 13.06.2025, wherein joint application preferred by the parties u/s 345 & 354 Cr.P.C has been allowed. Hence in the circumstances, instant application becomes infructuous. S.Nawaz(St)’ JUDGE
